opinion.h4: SPIESEL v. ROOS. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 390, Misc. Decided October 10, 1966.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
385 U.S. 16 BRADFORD v. POSTEL, JUSTICE OF THE SUPREME COURT OF THE STATE OF NEW YORK, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 402, Misc. Decided October 10, 1966.
Louis J. Lefkowitz, Attorney General of New York, Samuel A. Hirshowitz, First Assistant Attorney General, and Brenda Soloff, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
